description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating parallel stripes of dark and light gray, resembling polished marble and black stone. The stripes run the full length of the block, creating a visually striking, high-contrast pattern. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The block is thick and robust, suggesting significant weight and durability. Its clean lines and uniform patterning indicate it is likely manufactured or precisely cut. The overall design is utilitarian yet decorative, suitable for use as a barrier or boundary in urban environments.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating dark and light gray stripes on top and solid black sides, giving it a modern, robust look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped top surface with horizontal bands and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical orientation of the stripes and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing vertical stripes and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set on a leveled concrete base or pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
